channel.title: Directory on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Directory on TLDRBins

item.title: Web Directory Enum
item.description: Web Directory Enum feroxbuster Download feroxbuster HTTP feroxbuster -u http://example.com/ --depth 1 --methods=GET,POST -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt HTTPS feroxbuster -u https://example.com/ -k --depth 1 --methods=GET,POST -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt Specify Extension feroxbuster -u http://example.com/ --methods=GET,POST --depth=1 -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -x html, asp, aspx gobuster Download gobuster gobuster dir -u http://example.com -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -t 40 -x php wfuzz # Fuzzing IDOR wfuzz -z range,1-99 http://example.com/users/FUZZ
